entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.038194. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SFRX_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0057.9728 - 12:05:55.893760 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SFRX_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SFRX_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\SFRX_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0057.9728] One of the following elements CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsIncludingDisposalGroupAndDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalents should appear as the opening and closing balance in the cash flow statement using the group http://sfrx/role/CondensedConsolidatedStatementsOfCashFlows. Instead the following balance items have been used in this statement Cash. Due to the implementaion of ASU-2016-18 at least one of the opening and closing balance items listed must be used in the cash flow statement.
Rule Element Id:9728 Rule version: 29.0.2 - SFRX_instance_2024_2025.xml 5567
